THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SNEED, JAMIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 750 FELL STREET #1, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $4,249.90 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,249.90, STAYED UNTIL MAY-09-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENTS/DAMAGES IF DFT VACATES IN TIMELY MANNER & PREMISES LEFT IN GOOD CONDITION. BOTH SIDES BEAR OWN COSTS. SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED. BACK RENT/DMGS AMOUNT INCLUDES UD DAMAGES OF $18.33 PER DAY FROM 4-1-95 THRU 5-9-95 IF DFT FAILS TERMS OF STIPULATION. NO FURTHER STAYS.

DEPT 07. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER: M.NORMAN. CLERK: G. SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. CASE SETTLED, JUDGMENT PERSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLTFF. CASE NOT SETTLED ON RECORD.
